item.title: purkka.fi Official List of The Best Films of the 2020s (So Far)
item.description: maybe the real best film of the decade is you, the girl reading this

item.title: FVN Review: String Zero
item.description: the real string zero? it was the repetitive quip i keep using in RSS descriptions no one is reading all along

item.title: FVN Review: Campo Largo
item.description: the real campo largo was all the investigators we baptized along the way

item.title: NOVEMBUCK 2025 reviews
item.description: deer time

item.title: FVN Review: The Red Ballet
item.description: the real red ballet was the barbie adaptation we watched to understand swan lake to understand the red ballet

item.title: The Transformation of the Film Bro
item.description: is the true film bro the friends we made along the way?

item.title: FVN Review: Ever Our Hearts Aglow...
item.description: the true aglow were our hearts ever all along

item.title: MAY WOLF 2025 reviews
item.description: may wolf? well, i hope it may

item.title: FVN Review: The Proximity Principle
item.description: ashley... you are the real proximity principle

item.title: FVN Review: Lookouts
item.description: were we the real lookouts all along?

item.title: FVN Review: Fatal Force
item.description: the real fatal force was inside me all along...

item.title: FVN Review: Spark Hearts
item.description: guys, stand back, i'm about to spark hearts

item.title: FVN Review: Silverstone
item.description: was the true silverstone the friends we got along the way all along?

item.description: bear with me...

item.title: FVN Review: How it goes
item.description: guys, that really was how it goes

item.description: they really became the canidae...

item.title: FVN Review: Sanctuary
item.description: what is this, some kind of sanctuary?

item.description: boys, i think we have discovered the fragments of the past

item.description: top 666 things you did not realize about the poetry of BoyOfSatanus

item.title: FVN Review: Devil's Gambit
item.description: what is this, some kind of devil's gambit?
